item.title: 1933-06-23 – Greeley Daily Tribune – Baab Bros and Dauth Advertisement
item.dc:creator: Nathaniel Dauth
item.description: The post 1933-06-23 – Greeley Daily Tribune – Baab Bros and Dauth Advertisement appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.
item.content:encoded:
1933-06-23 – Greeley Daily Tribune – Baab Bros and Dauth Advertisement
Weekly advertisement for the Baab Bros & Dauth store.

People
George Dauth

Details
Date: 1933-06-23
Location: USA, Colorado, Greeley
Source: The Greeley Tribune [USA, Colorado, Greeley], 1933-06-23
Permalink: https://dauthfamily.github.io/advertisement/1933-06-23-greeley-daily-tribune-baab-bros-and-dauth-advertisement/

The post 1933-06-23 – Greeley Daily Tribune – Baab Bros and Dauth Advertisement appeared first on Dauth Family Archive.
